examples.title: Convert Kilometers to Meters
examples.content: 5 km = ? m. Use: 5 km × (1000 m / 1 km) = 5000 m. The 'km' cancels, you're left with 'm'.

examples.title: Convert Hours to Seconds
examples.content: 2 hours = ? seconds. Use: 2 hr × (60 min/hr) × (60 s/min) = 7200 s. Each unit cancels step by step.
